stemHtml:
Refer to figure or to chart E(LO)2 in Jeppesen GSPRM 2017.
An aircraft is flying a flight leg from Wallasey (WAL) VOR/DME (N53°24′ W003°08′) to Honiley (HON) VOR/DME (N52°22′ W001°40′). What is the true bearing measured from Trent (TNT) VOR/DME (N53°03′ W001°40′) to the mid-point of the leg?
